timeline.description: Register to vote and get your Voter ID.
Candidates campaign and present their manifestos.
Cast your vote at your designated polling booth.
Votes are counted and results are declared.

steps.title: Check Eligibility
steps.content: You must be a citizen and at least 18 years old.

steps.title: Register to Vote
steps.content: Submit Form 6 online or at your local election office to get on the voter list.

steps.title: Get Voter ID
steps.content: Once registered, your Voter ID (EPIC) will be mailed to you or can be downloaded.

steps.title: Find Polling Booth
steps.content: Locate your designated polling station using the election commission website.

steps.title: Vote on Election Day
steps.content: Carry your Voter ID to the booth, press the button on the EVM, and confirm via VVPAT.
